title: Nothing
description: A Minecraft Story-Based Horror Mod that is based on situation from real life and tries to recreate my emotions from Depression as a Horror Creatures
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e055749d275771bb8993683036d38511a565bbf6.png)

_"I gave everything, and I was left with Nothing"_

### Welcome to **Nothing**.

**Nothing** is a Mod that is based on situation from real life, that I've been throught. It's concept is to make all emotions that I have felt in depression that I've had in this situation as a horror creatures. It currently adds 6 new horror creatures, it has a lore, and 2 of creatures are bosses that can be fought in boss battle. Each character, creature, or boss symbolizes situations I went through while fighting depression. The story is divided into phases, each representing a period of time in real life. There are also various cutscenes depending on your progress. Moving on to the next phase may surprise you, as it will differ significantly in terms of location, environment, and combat style. I plan to significantly expand the ending, so check for updates.

### NOTE: The mod itself may seem at first very small but it need to take 370 real minutes for it to become what it means to be. Remember to use advancements they explain a lot.

<details>
<summary>Story</summary>

**October 7, 2025**

There was one day...

In this day something happened...

Something that have created The Broken Node...

The Broken Node is a creture that protects and use The Crystal of Emotions, that Crystal can create bad things and good things but The Broken Node only release bad things...

The Broken Node has created Corruption wich is set of horror creatures that haunt your world...

Your goal is to find The Broken Node, destroy it and take The Crystal...

But, remember the story does not end here...

Not every wound can regenerate...

**November 3, 2025**

</details>
